summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Vocal Layers music platform updates. Backend APIs are 96.3% functional with all new user management features working. Frontend UI is fully functional with working volume controls, admin sidebar mobile responsiveness, plan selection, and complete admin user management functionality.

minor_bugs.issue: Create song endpoint expects multipart form-data but test sent JSON
minor_bugs.impact: Test implementation issue, not backend bug - endpoint works correctly

minor_issues.issue: Sidebar overlay prevents clicking outside to close on mobile

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with admin@vocallayers.com/admin123
Backend: New endpoint GET /api/plans returns plan information
Backend: New endpoint POST /api/admin/users/{id}/activate works
Backend: New endpoint POST /api/admin/users/batch-pricing works
Backend: Admin password reset functionality (manual and email)
Backend: Admin user management with plan selection and pricing
Frontend: Admin login at /admin/login
Frontend: Admin sidebar collapses on mobile viewport with hamburger menu
Frontend: Admin create user modal with plan selection (monthly/semester/annual)
Frontend: Admin activate user modal with date picker
Frontend: Admin edit individual price modal
Frontend: Admin password reset modal with manual password and email options
Frontend: Admin batch pricing modal with only_increase toggle
Frontend: Admin edit expiry date modal
Frontend: Admin edit activation/ingresso date modal
Frontend: User registration page with plan selection (monthly/semester/annual)
Frontend: Player page volume sliders change audio volume (not just mute/solo)
Frontend: Player page mute and solo buttons work
Frontend: Player page shows volume percentage numbers (100)
Frontend: Player page has 4 track lanes with different voice types
Frontend: Player page reset all button functionality
Frontend: Player page play/pause button and seek bar
